overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a scenic grassland valley with pine trees and rocky cliffs, transitioning from a dirt path to walking alongside a railway track with a wooden trestle bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland valley with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass between rocky cliffs

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
group of tall pine trees on the left hillside
scattered pine trees on the right slope
large rocky cliff face forming the left valley wall
rocky outcrop and cliff on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open grassland valley. Rocky cliffs frame both sides of the valley while scattered pine trees dot the landscape. The sky is clear and blue, and the camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves through the tall grass.

events.description: railway track becomes visible on the left side as the character moves through denser trees

agents.ego_description: walking through taller grass between pine trees, gradually approaching the railway line

entered.detail: single railway track running parallel to the walking direction
wooden railway bridge visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the defined dirt path into taller grass and denser pine tree cover. A railway track enters the scene on the left, running parallel to the direction of travel. The rocky cliff on the right draws closer, and a wooden trestle bridge becomes visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway corridor between cliff and grassy slope

events.description: character adjusts path to walk parallel to the railway track as the wooden bridge approaches

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the railway track with the wooden trestle bridge growing larger ahead

entered.detail: wooden telegraph poles lining the railway track

segments.scene_description: The character walks in a narrow corridor between the railway track on the left and the rocky cliff on the right. The wooden trestle bridge grows from a distant speck to a prominent structure ahead. Utility poles line the railway, and the terrain becomes more enclosed as the valley narrows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open grassland valley that gradually narrows into a confined corridor alongside a railway. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail framed by distant rocky cliffs and scattered pine trees under a clear blue sky. As the character moves into taller grass and denser pine cover, a railway track emerges on the left and the cliffside on the right draws closer. The scene then shifts into a narrow passage between the tracks and the rock wall, where utility poles line the path and a distant wooden trestle bridge steadily grows into a prominent structure ahead.
